_comment: Fake ValueCommerce affiliate Order Report API XML response (mixed status). Element names are illustrative pending live verification; the adapter reads candidate tag names defensively. No real credentials or account data.
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Result>
  <Transactions>
    <Transaction>
      <transactionId>T-10001</transactionId>
      <merchantId>2001</merchantId>
      <merchantName>Example Books Ltd</merchantName>
      <approvalStatus>p</approvalStatus>
      <amount>5500</amount>
      <reward>275</reward>
      <currency>JPY</currency>
      <clickDate>2026-04-01 10:00:00</clickDate>
      <orderDate>2026-04-01 10:15:00</orderDate>
    </Transaction>
    <Transaction>
      <transactionId>T-10002</transactionId>
      <merchantId>2001</merchantId>
      <merchantName>Example Books Ltd</merchantName>
      <approvalStatus>a</approvalStatus>
      <amount>12750</amount>
      <reward>637</reward>
      <currency>JPY</currency>
      <clickDate>2024-01-15 08:30:00</clickDate>
      <orderDate>2024-01-15 08:45:00</orderDate>
      <confirmationDate>2024-01-20 12:00:00</confirmationDate>
    </Transaction>
    <Transaction>
      <transactionId>T-10003</transactionId>
      <merchantId>2002</merchantId>
      <merchantName>Test Electronics Co</merchantName>
      <approvalStatus>c</approvalStatus>
      <amount>3200</amount>
      <reward>160</reward>
      <currency>JPY</currency>
      <clickDate>2025-09-10 14:00:00</clickDate>
      <orderDate>2025-09-10 14:20:00</orderDate>
      <confirmationDate>2025-09-15 09:00:00</confirmationDate>
      <rejectReason>Customer cancelled the order</rejectReason>
    </Transaction>
    <Transaction>
      <transactionId>T-10004</transactionId>
      <merchantId>2002</merchantId>
      <merchantName>Test Electronics Co</merchantName>
      <approvalStatus>i</approvalStatus>
      <amount>8000</amount>
      <reward>400</reward>
      <currency>JPY</currency>
      <clickDate>2024-09-01 09:00:00</clickDate>
      <orderDate>2024-09-01 09:30:00</orderDate>
      <confirmationDate>2024-09-05 10:00:00</confirmationDate>
      <invoiceDate>2024-10-01 00:00:00</invoiceDate>
    </Transaction>
  </Transactions>
</Result>
